flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 30 pp at Tohono O'odham Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (10.3% vs 40.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tohono O'odham Community College rose 57% between 2021 and 2024 (636 → 998).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tohono O'odham Community College rose 49% between 2021 and 2024 (48.1% → 71.7%).
